description: Bandai uses consecutive collector numbers BT3-121 / BT3-122 within Cross Worlds to encode the central Xenoverse-arc villain-plot-then-hero-response beat: Dark Plot names the Time Breakers' Towa-and-Mira scheme to collect warrior energy across historical timelines and break the Demon Realm seal; Time's Judgement is Chronoa's canonical 'Holy Time Judgement' signature attack from the Xenoverse games. The sequential numbering is the designer-coordinated framing — analogous to the WAR planeswalker-companion-spell adjacency precedent but inverted (villain plot then hero response rather than walker then matching spell). This is the rare Bandai TCG case of card-sequence-as-narrative-encoding.
